exec: pm.test('Root schema is valid', function () { const b = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(b.message).to.be.a('string'); pm.expect(b.docs).to.eql('/docs'); });

pm.test('Answer schema and domain result are valid', function () { const b = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(b.question).to.eql('Which Ferrari cars have more than 700 horsepower?'); pm.expect(b.answer).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(b.answer.toLowerCase()).to.include('ferrari'); pm.expect(b.request_id).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(b.request_id).to.eql(pm.response.headers.get('X-Request-ID')); });

pm.test('PageRank answer is returned', function () { const b = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(b.answer).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(b.answer.toLowerCase()).to.include('pagerank'); pm.expect(b.request_id).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });
pm.test('Non-empty answer is returned', function () { const b = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(b.answer).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(b.request_id).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });

pm.test('No-match case is handled cleanly', function () { const b = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(b.answer).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; pm.expect(b.request_id).to.be.a('string').and.not.empty; });
pm.test('Blank-input message is returned', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().detail).to.eql('Question must not be blank'); });
pm.test('Length validation detail is returned', function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().detail).to.be.an('array').and.not.empty; });
